plugins.name: helio
plugins.description: ZURB's Helio user research platform — 14 skills focused on test design (Section Types, UX Metrics, Audience Flow, Branching, Patterns, Asset-to-Test, Assets), test orientation (App, CLI, MCP), and reading reports (Report Filtering, Design Analysis, Findings, Reading-a-Report+Glare-Signal). Companion marketplace to Glare.
